# Maksym Shykov

> Engineering leader and hands-on builder focused on AI product development,
> engineering leadership, quality engineering, and practical software delivery.

Maksym Shykov runs engineering teams at Headway, mentors engineers, and builds
AI-powered products hands-on. The site contains experience notes, writing, and
links to public projects.

## Core Pages

- Home: https://shykov.dev/
- Experience: https://shykov.dev/experience
- Writing: https://shykov.dev/blog
- The Engineer Changelog: https://shykov.dev/blog/the-engineer-changelog

## Projects

- CV Toolkit: https://cv.shykov.dev/
- Zero to Moat: https://moat.shykov.dev/
- local-review: https://local-review.shykov.dev/
- Alotno: https://alotno.app/
- CoffeeSlack: https://www.coffeeslack.com/

## Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/mshykov
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maksym-shykov/
- X: https://x.com/Shykov

## Crawling
